title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/compression_engine.py (第 520 至 948 行，共 948 行) ---
 520 |             # 检测文件操作
 521 |             if any(keyword in content for keyword in ["创建", "修改", "删除", "created", "modified", "deleted"]):
 522 |                 # 简单提取文件路径
 523 |                 import re
 524 |                 file_patterns = [
 525 |                     r'([a-zA-Z0-9_\-/\\]+\.(py|js|ts|java|cpp|c|h|json|md|txt))',
 526 |                     r'文件[:\s]+([a-zA-Z0-9_\-/\\]+)',
 527 |                     r'file[:\s]+([a-zA-Z0-9_\-/\\]+)'
 528 |                 ]
 529 |                 for pattern in file_patterns:
 530 |                     matches = re.findall(pattern, content, re.IGNORECASE)
 531 |                     for match in matches:
 532 |                         path = match[0] if isinstance(match, tuple) else match
 533 |                         files_changed.append(FileChange(
 534 |                             path=path,
 535 |                             action="modified",
 536 |                             summary=f"文件操作（{strategy.value}策略）",
 537 |                             importance=avg_importance
 538 |                         ))
 539 | 
 540 |         # 提取错误记录
 541 |         errors_encountered = []
 542 |         for i, msg in enumerate(messages):
 543 |             content = str(msg.get("content", ""))
 544 |             if any(keyword in content for keyword in ["Error", "错误", "Exception", "失败", "Traceback"]):
 545 |                 errors_encountered.append(ErrorRecord(
 546 |                     error_type="unknown",
 547 |                     error_message=content[:200],  # 截取前200字符
 548 |                     timestamp=datetime.now().isoformat()
 549 |                 ))
 550 | 
 551 |         # 提取工具使用
 552 |         tools_used = []
 553 |         tool_counts = {}
 554 |         for msg in messages:
 555 |             if msg.get("role") == "tool":
 556 |                 tool_name = msg.get("name", "unknown")
 557 |                 tool_counts[tool_name] = tool_counts.get(tool_name, 0) + 1
 558 | 
 559 |         for tool_name, count in tool_counts.items():
 560 |             tools_used.append(ToolUsage(
 561 |                 tool_name=tool_name,
 562 |                 parameters={},
 563 |                 result_summary=f"调用了 {count} 次",
 564 |                 timestamp=datetime.now().isoformat(),
 565 |                 success=True,
 566 |                 importance=0.5
 567 |             ))
 568 | 
 569 |         # 生成摘要文本（改进版：提取关键帧的实际内容）
 570 |         summary_parts = []
 571 |         task_goal = None
 572 |         key_decisions = []
 573 | 
 574 |         # 1. 提取用户消息（任务目标）
 575 |         user_messages = [msg for msg in messages if msg.get("role") == "user"]
 576 |         if user_messages:
 577 |             first_user_msg = user_messages[0].get("content", "")
 578 |             if isinstance(first_user_msg, str):
 579 |                 task_goal = first_user_msg[:100]  # 提取前100字符作为任务目标
 580 |                 summary_parts.append(f"任务: {task_goal}")
 581 | 
 582 |         # 2. 提取关键消息的实际内容
 583 |         key_content_count = 0
 584 |         for msg in messages:
 585 |             if key_content_count >= 5:  # 只提取前5条关键内容
 586 |                 break
 587 | 
 588 |             content = msg.get("content", "")
 589 |             if not isinstance(content, str):
 590 |                 continue
 591 | 
 592 |             role = msg.get("role", "")
 593 | 
 594 |             # 提取错误消息
 595 |             if any(keyword in content for keyword in ["Error", "错误", "Exception", "失败", "Traceback"]):
 596 |                 error_preview = content[:80].replace("\n", " ").strip()
 597 |                 summary_parts.append(f"错误: {error_preview}...")
 598 |                 key_content_count += 1
 599 | 
 600 |             # 提取关键决策（assistant 消息中的关键内容）
 601 |             elif role == "assistant" and len(content) > 20:
 602 |                 # 检测关键决策关键词
 603 |                 decision_keywords = ["已完成", "已创建", "已修改", "成功", "完成", "建议", "决...
